summary: S&P 500 climbed to new all-time high April 30; Dow +730 pts (+1.5%); Caterpillar +10% on earnings beat; Meta -9%, Microsoft -5% on high AI capex; Qualcomm +16% on earnings beat; Eli Lilly +7%; April on track for best month since late 2020. Energy concerns: California gas hits $6/gallon +30% since US-Israel war on Iran (late Feb).
